name: Key Lime Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the yogurt to make yogurt cheese. Place a clean piece of cheesecloth or muslin in a colander or large funnel, then spoon the yogurt into the cloth. Place the colander over a bowl and refrigerate overnight. The whey will drain from the yogurt, leaving the yogurt cheese in the cloth.
2. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
3. Lightly grease an 8-inch pie pan or 7-inch springform pan.
4. Place the yogurt cheese in a medium-sized bowl. Add sugar, cornstarch, and lime juice, mixing gently with a fork or wire whisk until well blended.
5. Stir in the eggs. Pour into the prepared pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
6. Bake until center is set: 25 to 30 minutes for an 8-inch pie pan, or 55 to 60 minutes for a springform pan.
7. Cool slightly on a wire rack. Refrigerate until chilled.
